description.value:
Requirements You are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Blinded] or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] with a duration of 1 minute or less.

You have a well-developed nictitating membrane, which you use to see underwater and clear out obstructions. If you are dazzled due to an effect other than Nictitating Membrane, reduce the flat check DC to target a creature with concealment caused by your dazzled condition from 5 to 3 until the end of your next turn. If you are blinded, attempt a @Check[flat|dc:10]. On a success, you remove the blinded condition and gain the dazzled condition instead for the same duration as the blinded condition. You cannot use this to remove a permanent blinded condition.
